question: Can artificial intelligence systems be safely used in children's toys without privacy and safety risks?
topic: Addresses emerging consumer safety issue where marketing claims exceed regulatory oversight and safe

sources.name: Children's Online Privacy Protection Rule (COPPA) — FTC

discovery_sources.text: Artificial Intelligence: We don’t know if AI-powered toys are safe, but they’re here anyway
